description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two cylindrical speakers mounted on individual stands with circular bases. The speakers are sleek and predominantly black, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The front face of each speaker features a visible circular grille, likely made of metal mesh, which protects the internal drivers. The stands are sturdy and simple, supporting the speakers at an upward angle for optimal sound projection. There are no visible control panels, buttons, or ports on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for placement in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or public gathering spaces.
description: A pair of glossy black cylindrical speakers on stands with circular bases, featuring visible front grilles and a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cylindrical speakers aligned side by side, with their glossy surfaces and circular bases visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the cylindrical shape and the upward tilt of the speakers on their stands.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the speakers, with no visible grilles or controls, emphasizing the smooth, solid surfaces.
description_view_3: Angled front view highlighting the circular speaker grilles and the open face of each speaker, showing the internal mesh pattern.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Circular mesh pattern with concentric rings visible on the front face of each speaker.
